creator: freebsd@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
Please try the patch from 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130086

It should make kports.desktop automatically detect kde4's kdesu or even gksu.

If startet with either of these KPorts should not ask for kdesu in between (it 
may be the case in some rare ocasions, which can't be changed for now).

Note that a (not fully functional) Qt4-Version of Kports is already available 
@ kports.sf.net
It will be available sometime soon in the portstree.

Greetings
Hannes
